text: I feel an uncanny sense of curiosity and displacement here. The dim, otherworldly purple glow from the first room provokes wonder and perhaps a slight apprehension—am I entering a portal, a new realm of thought? In the second space, the juxtaposition of technological artifacts and reflective wall text fills me with the exhilarating tension between innovation and self-inquiry. I am both observer and observed, spiraling deeper into questions about how I connect with the world, and whether my presence alters what I witness. There is a quiet thrill in this silent, electric anticipation.
